daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn—conversations flowing, ideas sparkling. Mercury's got your back, so lean into that silver-tongue energy. People are genuinely drawn to whatever you're putting out.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the way you light up today. Whether you're coupled or single, authenticity is your love language rn. Real talk hits different when you're just being yourself.
daily.career: Trust those random ideas popping into your head—they're not random. Your intuition's running hot on projects and people. Speak up about what you see; your perspective matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for presence. Ground yourself with something tactile—tea, a walk, your hands in dirt. Movement over intensity; flow over force. You'll feel the shift immediately.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. You're feeling chatty and curious about everything, which honestly? Kind of your superpower rn. Trust those random conversations—they might lead somewhere unexpectedly cool.
weekly.love: Someone's vibing with your energy more than usual. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a softness in the air that makes connection feel less forced and more... natural. Let yourself be a little vulnerable.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. That project or proposal you've been sitting on? This is the moment to share it. Your voice carries weight right now, so speak up with confidence.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for a breather. Try something grounding—long walks, journaling, literally touching grass. Your body knows what it needs; just gotta listen to that inner voice.
